title: Mini black line
description: This resource pack adds a minor improvement to the game by adding a black line around items. I can increase the version, but not decrease it; only "1.12.2" applies (This resource pack does not apply to block items).
body: This resource pack adds a minor improvement to the game by adding a black line around items. I can increase the version, but not decrease it; only "1.12.2" applies (This resource pack does not apply to block items).
